author: jerryshi
description: Copy notes to WeChat as chat-friendly plain text, or as a rendered image. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: jerryshi
manifest.description: Copy notes to WeChat as chat-friendly plain text, or as a rendered image.
manifest.name: Copy to WeChat

name: Copy to WeChat

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Copy your Obsidian notes to WeChat — either as chat-friendly plain text (with clean indentation and list formatting) or as a rendered image. Available from the editor right-click menu and the command palette.

### Changes in 0.2.1
- Re-release to re-trigger the community automated review. No functional changes from 0.2.0.

### Included since 0.2.0
- **Test connection button** in settings: sends a minimal request with your configured model and reports auth (401/403), base-URL (404), model-name (400/422), rate-limit and network/timeout errors distinctly, with the server's error detail.
- **AI formatting keeps nested indentation in WeChat**: output is normalized so leading indentation uses full-width spaces — WeChat collapses leading half-width spaces, which previously flattened sub-items.
- **Better default prompt**: preserves images, strips footnote markers / LaTeX `$$` delimiters / `[text](url)` markdown link syntax, keeps existing numbering & hierarchy instead of flattening, and no longer wraps inline bold in brackets.
- **Progress notice no longer vanishes mid-run**: the "formatting…" / "rendering…" toast stays for the whole AI-formatting / image-render duration.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Copy your Obsidian notes to WeChat — either as chat-friendly plain text (with clean indentation and list formatting) or as a rendered image. Available from the editor right-click menu and the command palette.

### Changes in 0.2.0
- **Test connection button** in settings: sends a minimal request with your configured model and reports auth (401/403), base-URL (404), model-name (400/422), rate-limit and network/timeout errors distinctly, with the server's error detail.
- **AI formatting keeps nested indentation in WeChat**: output is normalized so leading indentation uses full-width spaces — WeChat collapses leading half-width spaces, which previously flattened sub-items.
- **Better default prompt**: preserves images, strips footnote markers / LaTeX `$$` delimiters / `[text](url)` markdown link syntax, keeps existing numbering & hierarchy instead of flattening or renumbering, and no longer wraps inline bold in brackets.
- **Progress notice no longer vanishes mid-run**: the "formatting…" / "rendering…" toast now stays for the whole AI-formatting / image-render duration and is dismissed only when the result is ready.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Copy your Obsidian notes to WeChat — either as chat-friendly plain text (with clean indentation and list formatting) or as a rendered image. Available from the editor right-click menu and the command palette.

### Changes in 0.1.1
- Render the image export via `DOMParser` and move the article theme into `styles.css` (no more injected `<style>` element)
- Use the standard Async Clipboard API for image copy
- Address Obsidian community plugin review findings (lint/compliance); no user-facing behavior change
